items.md: On the history of voodoo and its appropriation into Euro-American culture, see Gary Rhodes, *White Zombie: Anatomy of a Horror Film* (Jefferson, N.C.: MacFarland, 2001); Laënnec Hurbon, *Voodoo: Search for the Spirit* (New York: Abrams, 1995). The idea of black violence against whites had a basis in reality: black rebels burned two thousand plantations and killed a thousand whites during the war against French colonialism.
